name: Sediment Core Radiometric Measurements from LSMo22-1 Event
description: Dataset containing radiometric measurements (210Pb and 137Cs) from sediment core samples collected during event LSMo22-1 at a single location in Mexico (21.365278, -104.568333) on April 8, 2022. Includes sediment depth intervals, supported and unsupported 210Pb activities, and associated standard deviations.
